Package org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer

Class SerializerSession.Builder<SELF extends SerializerSession.Builder<SELF>>

java.lang.Object
org.apache.juneau.marshall.ContextSession.Builder<SELF>
org.apache.juneau.marshall.MarshallingSession.Builder<SELF>
org.apache.juneau.marshall.MarshallingTraverseSession.Builder<SELF>
org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer.SerializerSession.Builder<SELF>
Direct Known Subclasses:
OutputStreamSerializerSession.Builder, SerializerSession.DefaultBuilder, WriterSerializerSession.Builder
Enclosing class:
SerializerSession
public abstract static class SerializerSession.Builder<SELF extends SerializerSession.Builder<SELF>> extends MarshallingTraverseSession.Builder<SELF>
Builder class.

  • Method Details

    • build

      public SerializerSession build()
      Description copied from class: MarshallingSession.Builder
      Build the object.
      Overrides:
      build in class MarshallingSession.Builder<SELF extends SerializerSession.Builder<SELF>>
      Returns:
      The built object.

    • javaMethod

      public SELF javaMethod(Method value)
      The java method that called this serializer, usually the method in a REST servlet.
      Parameters:
      value - The new property value.
      Can be null (value will not be set, existing value will be kept).
      Returns:
      This object.

    • property

      public SELF property(String key, Object value)
      Description copied from class: ContextSession.Builder
      Adds a property to this session.

      If the key matches a known session property (e.g. "debug" or "ContextSession.debug"), the value is converted via BasicConverter and routed to the corresponding typed setter. Unknown keys are stored in the raw session properties map.

      Overrides:
      property in class MarshallingTraverseSession.Builder<SELF extends SerializerSession.Builder<SELF>>
      Parameters:
      key - The property key.
      Cannot be null.
      value - The property value.
      Can be null (resets typed properties to their default; removes raw properties).
      Returns:
      This object.

    • resolver

      public SELF resolver(VarResolverSession value)
      String variable resolver.

      If not specified, defaults to session created by VarResolver.DEFAULT.

      Parameters:
      value - The new property value.
      Can be null (value will not be set, defaults to session created by VarResolver.DEFAULT when accessed).
      Returns:
      This object.

    • schema

      public SELF schema(HttpPartSchema value)
      HTTP-part schema.

      Used for schema-based serializers and parsers to define additional formatting.

      Parameters:
      value - The new value for this property.
      Can be null (value will not be set, existing value will be kept).
      Returns:
      This object.

    • schemaDefault

      public SELF schemaDefault(HttpPartSchema value)
      Same as schema(HttpPartSchema) but doesn't overwrite the value if it is already set.
      Parameters:
      value - The new value for this property.
      If null, then the locale defined on the context is used.
      Returns:
      This object.

    • uriContext

      public SELF uriContext(UriContext value)
      URI context bean.

      Bean used for resolution of URIs to absolute or root-relative form.

      If not specified, defaults to Serializer.Builder.uriContext(UriContext).

      Parameters:
      value - The new property value.
      Can be null (value will not be set, defaults to Serializer.Builder.uriContext(UriContext) from context).
      Returns:
      This object.

    • keepNullProperties

      public SELF keepNullProperties(boolean value)
      Keep null bean property values.
      Parameters:
      value - The new value for this property.
      Returns:
      This object.

      Non-default inclusion.
      Parameters:
      value - The new value for this property.
      Returns:
      This object.
      Since:
      10.0.0
